accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurately describe the War Powers Resolution context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the May 1 deadline and procedural references match the bill's findings.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose to remove U.S. Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes reliance on existing War Powers Resolution and expedited procedures rather than creating new law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately lists all four rule-of-construction carve-outs material to the bill.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the May 1, 2026 deadline and that no new effective date is established.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the core directive and the rule-of-construction exceptions.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the War Powers Resolution, Iran, Israel, and Congress.

correct_figures.why: Dates (Feb 28, March 2, May 1, 2026) and the 60-day period are correctly stated.
